description_en: View the F1 Work Plans page.
Upload or create F1 work plans via direct upload or manual entry.
Approve, request changes, or decline ERR App submissions.
View the ERR App submissions list and the pool overview.

label_en: Stage projects and move to F2
description_en: Select approved projects and move them to the F2 Uncommitted List.
Assign a grant serial to an approved project in staging.
View the F2 Approvals page.
Commit selected F1s from the Uncommitted list, delete uncommitted F1s, or decommit F1s (move back to uncommitted).
Create an F3 MOU from selected committed F1s on the F2 Approvals page.
Upload the community approval document for an F1 (uncommitted or committed) on the F2 page.
Edit F1 project details and expenses for uncommitted or committed projects on the F2 page.
View MOU for committed projects from the F2 committed list.
View the F3 MOUs page.
Edit MOU content, budget, and details on the F3 MOU page.
Assign MOU to projects and manage MOU workflow from the F3 MOU page.
Reassign committed F1s (or MOU work plans) to a different grant on the F3 MOU stage.
Open MOU preview and download PDF on the F3 MOU page.
List projects in an MOU and add or remove projects before assignment.
View and add payment confirmations for an MOU on the F3 page.
Upload or view the signed MOU PDF for an MOU on the F3 page.

label_ar: عرض صفحة التقارير F4 و F5
description_en: View the F4 & F5 Reporting page.
Upload F4 financial reports.
View and edit F4 financial reports on the F4–F5 Reporting and Project Management pages.
Financial team only: enter F4 serial number to fetch F4 information from the portal.
Set F4 review status to accepted or rejected (with comment); upload receipt and proof of payment per F4.
Upload F5 program reports.
View and edit F5 program reports on the F4–F5 Reporting and Project Management pages.
View the User Management page.
Approve pending user registrations.
Edit which function permissions each user has (this page).
Edit user roles and state visibility (access rights).
View the Grant Management page.
View the Project Management page.
View project details on the Project Management page.
Change F4 and F5 reporting status for a project on the Project Management page.
Mark a project as complete on the Project Management page.
View the Room Management page.
Approve or decline pending room submissions on the Room Management page.
Change state or locality for active rooms on the Room Management page.
Deactivate active rooms on the Room Management page.
View the ERR Portal Dashboard page.
